title: Notisi ya Mpango wa Matumizi ya Ardhi (Mipango ya Matumizi ya Ardhi ya Vijiji), ya mwaka 2023
title_en: Notisi ya Mpango wa Matumizi ya Ardhi (Mipango ya Matumizi ya Ardhi ya Vijiji), ya mwaka 2023

provisions.content: Notisi hii intaitwa Notisi ya Mpango wa Matumizi ya Ardhi (Mipango ya Matumizi ya Ardhi ya Vijiji), ya mwaka 2023.

Maeneo yaliyoainishwa kwenye Jedwali yanatangazwa kuwa na Mipango ya Matumizi ya Ardhi ya Vijiji kwa mujibu wa Sheria ya Upangaji wa Matumizi ya Ardhi. [Sura ya 116] Jedwali (limetengenezwa chini ya aya ya 2) Mkoa Halmashauri ya Wilaya Kijiji Dodoma Chamwino Igandu Msamalo Mnase Jumla 3 History of this document 07 April 2023 this version Published in Gazette of the United Republic of Tanzania 11 Commenced 03 April 2023 Assented to Related documents More documents like this one [] [] [] [] ▲ To the top > Contact us Visit our Twitter/X profile Visit our Linked In profile Visit our YouTube channel About TanzLII TanzLII is operated by the Judiciary of Tanzania and the Office of the Attorney General, Chief Parliamentary Draftsman, and publishes the law of Tanzania for free online access for all.
